headline: 暑期档热度攀升，多部新片引发期待
headlineEn: Summer Box Office Heats Up with Highly Anticipated New Releases
summary: 今日娱乐新闻：国产悬疑《痴迷》持续领跑热搜，《福尔摩斯小姐3》与《无职转生》动画热度不减，《末日地堡》《气体人第一号》引发关注。本周新片《达顿牧场》《穿普拉达的女王2》等蓄势待发。
summaryEn: Today's entertainment news: Chinese suspense film 'Obsession' continues to trend; 'Enola Holmes 3' and 'Mushoku Tensei' anime remain hot; 'Silo' and 'The First Gas Man' draw attention. New films this week include 'The Dutton Ranch' and 'The Devil Wears Prada 2'.

topTrends.title: 无职转生：到了异世界就拿出真本事

industryHighlights.text: 本周新片《达顿牧场》备受关注，衍生剧集前景看好。
industryHighlights.en: New film 'The Dutton Ranch' draws attention, with promising spin-off series.

industryHighlights.text: 《穿普拉达的女王2》定档，原班人马回归引热议。
industryHighlights.en: 'The Devil Wears Prada 2' is set, original cast returns sparking buzz.

industryHighlights.text: 《超级少女》与《玩具总动员5》列入本周热搜，IP续作热度不减。
industryHighlights.en: 'Supergirl' and 'Toy Story 5' trend this week, IP sequels remain popular.

industryHighlights.text: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》等大片即将上映，暑期档竞争激烈。
industryHighlights.en: Upcoming blockbusters like 'Spider-Man: Brand New Day' signal fierce summer competition.
